title: Google Vids 2.0
description_en: Create on-brand videos at scale with Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1. Generate high-quality videos for free, add custom music, use avatars, and streamline workflows with Gemini across Workspace apps, all with powerful new AI capabilities.
description_zh: 借助由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 驱动的 Google Vids，大规模创建符合品牌调性的宣传视频。免费生成高质量视频，添加自定义音乐，使用虚拟形象，并通过 Gemini 在 Workspace 各应用中简化工作流程，同时全面利用强大的全新 AI 能力。

title: Mercury Edit 2
description_en: Mercury Edit 2 is a coding-focused diffusion LLM built specifically for next-edit prediction. It uses your recent edits and codebase context to suggest the next change, with much higher acceptance and much lower latency than typical code-edit models.
description_zh: Mercury Edit 2 是一款面向编程的扩散式大语言模型，专为预测“下一次编辑”而构建。它会利用你最近的编辑记录和代码库上下文来建议下一处修改，相比典型的代码编辑模型，具有更高的采纳率和更低的延迟。

title: Open Claude in Chrome
description_en: Claude in Chrome gives Claude Code full browser automation, but blocks 58 domains (banks, Tinder, Reddit, Robinhood, Bloomberg) and only works in Chrome/Edge. I reverse-engineered it from the tool schemas. Same 18 tools, same performance. No blocklist. Any Chromium browser. Open source.
description_zh: Chrome 中的 Claude 会为 Claude Code 提供完整的浏览器自动化能力，但它会屏蔽 58 个域名（银行、Tinder、Reddit、Robinhood、Bloomberg 等），而且只支持 Chrome/Edge。我是通过工具 schema 对它进行逆向分析得出的。相同的 18 个工具，相同的性能。没有屏蔽名单。适用于任何基于 Chromium 的浏览器。开源。

title: Vista
description_en: Preview can't browse folders. Quick Look vanishes when you click. Every alternative is Electron bloat or a full editing suite. Vista just shows the image — fast. Arrow keys, that's it. Simple on the surface, obsessively refined underneath. Every detail you'd expect from a native Mac app, and a few you wouldn't. Free.
description_zh: “预览”连文件夹都没法浏览。点一下，“快速查看”就消失了。其他替代品不是臃肿的 Electron 应用，就是完整的编辑套件。Vista 只是单纯地显示图片——速度很快。方向键翻看，仅此而已。表面简单，底层却打磨得近乎执着。你对原生 Mac 应用期待的一切细节，这里都有，甚至还有一些你意想不到的。免费。

title: APImage
description_en: Create studio-grade images in seconds. Edit your photos with AI in a single tap, generate stunning product visuals, remove backgrounds, or bring any idea to life. Experience pixel-perfect object preservation and consistent, high-quality results every time.
description_zh: 在几秒内创建影棚级图片。通过 AI 一键编辑照片，生成惊艳的产品视觉图、移除背景，或将任何创意变为现实。体验像素级精准的主体保留，以及始终如一的高质量效果。

title: Klick AI Camera Assistant
description_en: Klick is an AI camera that helps you shoot better photos instantly. Get live framing guidance, instant feedback, and simple visual tools that help you capture better photos — from your very first shot. Built for beginners, loved by creators.
description_zh: Klick 是一款 AI 相机，能帮助你即时拍出更好的照片。它提供实时构图指导、即时反馈和简洁直观的可视化工具，帮助你从第一张照片开始就拍得更好。为新手打造，深受创作者喜爱。

title: OpenGyver
description_en: Stop going to obscure websites, just to convert files, generate UUIDs, work with JSON/HTML data, and encode/decode strings. With OpenGyver, you can convert files/units/weather/movies/audio from your terminal. Pipe your results for automation, or use OpenGyver skill to let Claude Code do all these as a tool. OpenGyver is 100% free and open source, created just for the betterment of the future AI overlords.
description_zh: 别再为了转换文件、生成 UUID、处理 JSON/HTML 数据以及对字符串进行编码/解码而跑去那些冷门网站了。借助 OpenGyver，你可以直接在终端里完成文件/单位/天气/电影/音频等转换。你还可以通过管道传递结果来实现自动化，或者使用 OpenGyver skill，让 Claude Code 把这些能力当作工具来调用。OpenGyver 完全免费且开源，它的诞生纯粹是为了让未来的 AI 霸主变得更美好。

title: Fluently
description_en: Accurate subtitles & translations for YouTube, powered by AI. Translate 20+ languages with Dual subtitles. Better than YouTube auto-captions. Fluently uses AI to transcribe the raw audio and translate it properly with dedicated translation models, so you actually understand what's being said.
description_zh: 由 AI 驱动的 YouTube 精准字幕与翻译。支持 20 多种语言翻译，提供双语字幕。效果优于 YouTube 自动字幕。借助 AI 流畅地转录原始音频，并使用专用翻译模型进行准确翻译，让你真正听懂视频内容。

title: Clovr
description_en: Clovr is an AI tool that turns ideas into ready-to-use frontends. Clovr generates clean, structured Next.js code from simple prompts, helping developers and product teams ship faster without boilerplate. You can export the code or open it directly in a GitHub repository to keep building.
description_zh: Clovr 是一款将创意转化为可直接使用前端的 AI 工具。Clovr 能根据简单提示生成干净、结构清晰的 Next.js 代码，帮助开发者和产品团队无需编写样板代码即可更快交付。你可以导出代码，或直接在 GitHub 仓库中打开并继续开发。

title: GradPipe Delta
description_en: GradPipe Delta Engine analyzes your profile against engineers who already landed your dream role. Tell it where you want to be (e.g. 'Research Scientist at OpenAI'). It benchmarks you against 5 real people in that role, finds the exact gaps in your profile, and gives you 3 specific projects to close those gaps in 12 weeks. Not generic career advice. Evidence-based, peer-compared, brutally honest. Built on top of GradPipe's AST-level code analysis engine with 1,500+ engineers scored.
description_zh: GradPipe Delta Engine 会将你的个人资料与已经拿到你理想岗位的工程师进行对比分析。只需告诉它你的目标职位（例如“OpenAI 的研究科学家”）。它会将你与该岗位上的 5 位真实从业者进行基准对比，找出你个人资料中的具体差距，并给出 3 个可在 12 周内完成、用来弥补这些差距的具体项目。不是泛泛而谈的职业建议，而是基于证据、同侪对比、毫不留情的真实反馈。该系统构建于 GradPipe 的 AST 级代码分析引擎之上，已为 1,500 多名工程师完成评分。

title: WTMF AI (What's The Matter, Friend?)
description_en: WTMF (What's The Matter, Friend?) is an AI companion built for the generation that's more connected than ever and lonelier than ever. It listens without judgment, remembers your story, and actually responds like it cares. No therapy speak, no robotic replies. Chat, voice call, journal, track your mood. Pick a personality that matches your vibe. Your space, your terms. Not therapy. Better than bottling it up.
description_zh: WTMF（What’s The Matter, Friend?）是一款为这个前所未有地彼此连接、却也前所未有地孤独的一代打造的 AI 陪伴产品。它会不带评判地倾听，记住你的故事，并且真的会像在乎你一样回应。没有心理治疗式的话术，也没有机械化的回复。你可以聊天、语音通话、写日记、记录情绪。还可以选择与你气质相符的个性设定。你的空间，你说了算。不是心理治疗，但总比把一切憋在心里更好。

title: FraudGuard‑Fraud Prevention for Shopify
description_en: FraudGuard is an advanced fraud prevention app for Shopify that blocks risky orders before they lead to chargebacks. It uses configurable risk scoring (country, email domain, first‑time buyers), email blacklist and domain filters, country blocking, and first‑order rules. Automatically flag or cancel suspicious orders with real‑time monitoring, admin and customer notifications, and clear risk indicators—saving merchants time and money.
description_zh: FraudGuard 是一款面向 Shopify 的高级欺诈防护应用，可在高风险订单引发拒付之前将其拦截。它采用可配置的风险评分机制（如国家、邮箱域名、首次购买用户），并支持邮箱黑名单与域名过滤、国家屏蔽以及首单规则。通过实时监控、管理员与客户通知以及清晰的风险指示器，自动标记或取消可疑订单，帮助商家节省时间和成本。

title: The MCP Server for MCP Servers by Stork
description_en: Stork MCP is the "MCP Server for MCP Servers" — a meta-layer that lets you discover 7000 + MCP servers from inside your IDE via natural language. Unlike other directories, Stork requires zero installation (just add a remote URL), provides trust signals like maintenance status and security scores before you install, and generates ready-to-paste configs for Cursor, Claude, VS Code, and Zed. One line of config, no npm install needed.
description_zh: Stork MCP 是“面向 MCP 服务器的 MCP 服务器”——一个元层，让你能够在 IDE 内通过自然语言发现 7000+ 个 MCP 服务器。与其他目录不同，Stork 无需任何安装（只需添加一个远程 URL），并且在你安装前就提供维护状态、安全评分等可信信号，还能为 Cursor、Claude、VS Code 和 Zed 生成可直接粘贴的配置。只需一行配置，无需执行 npm install。

title: Bible App For Everyone
description_en: Read the Holy Bible anytime with offline access, audio Bible, verse of the day, bookmarks, reminders, and beautiful reader. Simple, fast, free Bible app for everyone.
description_zh: 随时阅读《圣经》，支持离线访问、有声圣经、每日经文、书签、提醒功能以及精美的阅读界面。简单、快速、免费的圣经应用，适合所有人。

title: NestChat
description_en: Stop scrolling. Fix your messy ChatGPT sidebar in 10 seconds. NestChat adds folders, subfolders, and color-coding directly into ChatGPT. No new tabs—just a clean panel to organize your workflow. Drag & Drop: Move chats into folders instantly. Tag & Search: Use #labels and global search to find any prompt. Privacy First: All data stays in your browser. Free: 3 folders / 10 chats. Pro ($4.99/mo): Unlimited everything. Stop hunting. Start nesting.
description_zh:
别再一直滑动查找了。10 秒内修复你杂乱无章的 ChatGPT 侧边栏。

NestChat 可直接在 ChatGPT 中加入文件夹、子文件夹和颜色标记。无需打开新标签页——只需一个干净整洁的面板，就能组织好你的工作流。

拖放：立即将聊天移动到文件夹中。  
标签与搜索：使用 #标签 和全局搜索查找任何提示词。  
隐私优先：所有数据都保留在你的浏览器中。  
免费版：3 个文件夹 / 10 个聊天。  
专业版（$4.99/月）：全部无限。

别再四处翻找，开始整理归类吧。

title: ClawFace
description_en: A dedicated Windows PC for AI Computer Use. Your AI agent — Claude, OpenClaw, or any other — gets its own screen, browser, desktop, and terminal. A real comClawFace gives AI agents a real Windows 11 desktop they can see, click, type, and control. Works with Claude, OpenClaw, and any computer-use agent. Each agent gets its own private PC with persistent storage, a browser, and a terminal — personal computers for AI.
description_zh: 一台专为 AI 计算机使用打造的 Windows PC。你的 AI 智能体——Claude、OpenClaw 或其他任何智能体——都能拥有自己独立的屏幕、浏览器、桌面和终端。真正的 comClawFace 为 AI 智能体提供一个真实的 Windows 11 桌面，它们可以看到、点击、输入并进行控制。兼容 Claude、OpenClaw 以及任何具备计算机操作能力的智能体。每个智能体都拥有自己的私有 PC，配备持久化存储、浏览器和终端——这就是属于 AI 的个人电脑。

title: Between Ventures
description_en: Accelerate your product-market-fit journey. Manage your startup experiments with AI-driven experiment ideas, build new business model canvas with a simple prompt, instantly reverse-engineer any company's business model with AI and visualize the complete Business Model Canvas.
description_zh: 加速你的产品与市场匹配（PMF）进程。借助 AI 驱动的实验创意管理你的创业实验，通过一个简单的提示词构建全新的商业模式画布，并利用 AI 即时逆向解析任何公司的商业模式，可视化完整的商业模式画布。

title: Nestly
description_en: Nestly is a completely offline, privacy-first personal budget and expense tracker. Unlike other finance apps that force expensive subscriptions and cloud logins, Nestly stores everything locally on your device. Easily set custom budget periods, log daily expenses across 20 categories, and visualize spending with beautiful charts. With multi-currency support, dark mode, and zero account creation required, taking control of your personal finances has never been simpler or more secure.
description_zh: Nestly 是一款完全离线、以隐私为先的个人预算与支出追踪工具。不同于其他强制用户支付高额订阅费并登录云端账户的理财应用，Nestly 会将所有数据本地存储在你的设备上。你可以轻松自定义预算周期，按 20 个类别记录每日支出，并通过精美图表直观查看消费情况。支持多币种、深色模式，且无需创建账户，让你以前所未有的简单与安全方式掌控个人财务。

title: TuBoost
description_en: TuBoost turns long videos into short clips for TikTok, Reels and Shorts automatically. Upload a video or paste a YouTube link. AI finds the best moments, burns in subtitles, tracks the speaker's face. What makes it different: before spending anything, you see every clip with a title and description. You pick what you want. No surprises. No subscription. Buy TuBoost Coins when you need them. They never expire. Plus a built-in affiliate program share your link, earn free coins.
description_zh:
TuBoost 可将长视频自动剪成适合 TikTok、Reels 和 Shorts 的短片。上传视频或粘贴 YouTube 链接即可。AI 会找出最精彩的片段，自动烧录字幕，并跟踪说话者的面部。

它的不同之处在于：在你花任何钱之前，你就能看到每一个剪辑片段，并附有标题和描述。你来选择自己想要的内容。没有意外。无需订阅。只在需要时购买 TuBoost Coins，而且永不过期。

另外还内置了联盟推广计划：分享你的链接，即可赚取免费金币。

title: Glimpse
description_en: Glimpse puts your flashcards, quizzes, and study material directly on your iOS home screen as a widget. Instead of opening an app to study, your cards rotate throughout the day. Tap to flip, swipe to advance. Import files or upload notes and generate cards with AI. Build decks on the web and everything syncs to your phone. Schedule different content for morning, afternoon, and evening. Also supports todo lists, quote boards, countdowns, and daily trivia. Free with a generous limit. Built solo.
description_zh: Glimpse 将你的抽认卡、测验和学习资料以小组件的形式直接放到 iOS 主屏幕上。你无需打开应用来学习，卡片会在一天中持续轮换显示。点击可翻面，滑动可切换到下一张。你可以导入文件或上传笔记，并用 AI 生成卡片。也可以在网页端创建卡组，所有内容都会同步到手机。还可为早晨、下午和晚上安排不同的内容。另支持待办清单、语录板、倒计时和每日冷知识。免费使用，额度相当宽松。由独立开发者单独打造。

title: Factory Floor
description_en: Factory Floor is a native macOS app for running development workstreams in parallel — fast, responsive, and built for local workflows. Each workstream gets its own git worktree, terminal, dev server, and Claude Code session — all isolated, all in one window. No more juggling branches, terminals, or contexts. Sessions stay alive and ready, so you can pick up work instantly. Free, fast, and open source.
description_zh: Factory Floor 是一款原生 macOS 应用，用于并行运行开发工作流——快速、响应灵敏，专为本地工作流打造。每个工作流都拥有各自独立的 git worktree、终端、开发服务器和 Claude Code 会话——彼此隔离，却全部集中在一个窗口中。无需再在分支、终端或上下文之间来回切换。会话始终保持在线并随时可用，让你能够立即接手工作。免费、快速、开源。

title: Agentikus
description_en: Agentikus is a control interface for autonomous agents. Send instructions, exchange files, and monitor AI agent activity from one place.
description_zh: Agentikus 是一个面向自主智能体的控制界面。你可以在一个地方发送指令、交换文件，并监控 AI 智能体的活动。

title: Mazel
description_en: Mazel delivers a daily Yiddish expression with its meaning, cultural origin, and real-world usage. Explore collections like "For Hard Days" and "Make Me Laugh," track the Hebrew calendar, and hear authentic pronunciations. A living connection to Yiddish heritage.
description_zh: Mazel 每日推送一则意第绪语表达，附上其含义、文化渊源和现实用法。你可以浏览诸如“For Hard Days”和“Make Me Laugh”等专题合集，追踪希伯来历，并聆听地道发音。这是连接意第绪文化遗产的一种鲜活方式。

title: Neuro OS
description_en: Just A new Free AI OS From Mena Region | The Code Base Built By Gemini Pro 3.1 - loayabdalslam/NeuroOS
description_zh: 来自中东和北非地区的一款全新免费 AI 操作系统 | 代码库由 Gemini Pro 3.1 构建 - loayabdalslam/NeuroOS

title: ContribOS
description_en: ContribOS is a self-hostable, open-source platform that bridges OSS maintainers and contributors using AI agents. How it works: → Discover issues matched to your skills by AI scoring → Agent clones the repo, calls your chosen LLM (8 providers supported), generates a unified diff → Review gate keeps humans in the loop → Approved fixes become GitHub PRs with AI disclosure built in Supports BYOK, Google's A2A protocol, and Contribution Health Score reputation tracking. MIT licensed. Free forever.
description_zh: ContribOS 是一个可自行托管的开源平台，通过 AI 代理连接开源软件（OSS）维护者与贡献者。其工作方式如下：→ 通过 AI 评分发现与您的技能匹配的问题 → 代理克隆仓库，调用您选择的 LLM（支持 8 家提供商），生成统一 diff → 审核关卡确保人类始终参与其中 → 获批修复将成为 GitHub PR，并内置 AI 披露支持 BYOK、Google 的 A2A 协议，以及用于声誉追踪的 Contribution Health Score。采用 MIT 许可证，永久免费。

title: Pinboard
description_en: Pinboard is the fastest way to capture and fix UI issues on live websites. Instead of writing long bug reports or installing SDKs, users can click directly on any element of a webpage and leave contextual feedback. Pinboard automatically captures DOM data, screenshots, and visual context, turning feedback into structured reports that developers can instantly act on. Teams can collect feedback from clients, users, or internal QA - without integrations, browser extensions, or complicated setup.
description_zh: Pinboard 是在真实网站上捕获并修复 UI 问题的最快方式。用户无需撰写冗长的缺陷报告或安装 SDK，只需直接点击网页上的任意元素，即可留下具备上下文的反馈。Pinboard 会自动捕获 DOM 数据、截图和可视化上下文，将反馈转化为开发者可立即处理的结构化报告。团队可以在无需集成、浏览器扩展或复杂配置的情况下，收集来自客户、用户或内部 QA 的反馈。

title: Greet Gems
description_en: Greet Gems is a lightweight web app that generates personalized greetings quickly and easily. Built for fun and from a real need, it helps you send thoughtful messages without generic mass texts. Using AI, it tailors messages while keeping you in control of the final edit and delivery. It can also select subsets of contacts based on prompts. Free to use with your own API keys. Feedback and collaborators are welcome!
description_zh: Greet Gems 是一款轻量级 Web 应用，可快速、轻松地生成个性化问候语。它因实际需求而生，也以趣味为出发点，帮助你发送贴心的信息，而不是千篇一律的群发内容。借助 AI，它能够定制消息，同时让你始终掌控最终的编辑与发送。它还可以根据提示词选择联系人子集。使用你自己的 API 密钥即可免费使用。欢迎提供反馈，也欢迎合作伙伴加入！

title: Learn AI on your Terminal
description_en: Learn AI engineering the way developers learn best: by doing. 🎯 Terminal-only bootcamp 📚 14 hands-on modules ⚡ 10 hours to production-ready 🚀 No videos, no fluff
description_zh: 以开发者最擅长的方式学习 AI 工程：动手实战。🎯 纯终端训练营 📚 14 个实操模块 ⚡ 10 小时达到可投入生产的水平 🚀 没有视频，没有废话

title: HeartBLE for Apple Watch
description_en: HeartBLE: Skip the chest strap. Broadcast your Apple Watch heart rate directly to Mac, PC, iPad, Zwift, Rouvy, MyWhoosh and any trainer — no iPhone in the middle. The only app in the niche that uses standard HR BLE protocol for true direct connection. No intermediate phone, no battery drain. Just enable Bluetooth + Health, pair once, tap Start. Reliable throughout your workout. Built by a cyclist for indoor cyclists, rowers & runners who hate chest straps and complicated phone setups.
description_zh: HeartBLE：跳过胸带。将你的 Apple Watch 心率直接广播到 Mac、PC、iPad、Zwift、Rouvy、MyWhoosh 以及任何训练设备——中间无需 iPhone。这个细分领域中唯一一款使用标准 HR BLE 协议、实现真正直接连接的应用。没有中间手机，不耗手机电量。只需开启蓝牙和“健康”，配对一次，点击“开始”。整个训练过程中都稳定可靠。由一位骑行者为室内骑行者、划船者和跑者打造，献给那些讨厌胸带和复杂手机设置的人。

title: Montessori Parent Guide
description_en: Montessori Parent Guide helps parents of children 0–6 handle tricky moments, make everyday parenting decisions, improve child’s room setup, and find age-based activities with AI guidance.
description_zh: 《蒙特梭利家长指南》通过 AI 指导，帮助 0–6 岁儿童的家长应对棘手时刻、做出日常育儿决策、优化孩子房间的布置，并找到适合相应年龄阶段的活动。

title: telegramdesktop/tdesktop
description_en: Telegram Desktop messaging app
description_zh: Telegram Desktop 是 Telegram 官方推出的桌面端即时通讯客户端，基于 Telegram API 和 MTProto 安全协议，提供在 Windows、macOS 和 Linux 上的消息收发与沟通能力。它面向希望在电脑上使用 Telegram 的个人用户与办公协作场景，适合日常聊天、文件传输和跨设备通信。项目主要采用 Qt 构建界面与跨平台能力，并结合 OpenSSL、WebRTC、FFmpeg、Opus 等技术支持安全通信、多媒体处理和实时交互。

title: onyx-dot-app/onyx
description_en: Open Source AI Platform - AI Chat with advanced features that works with every LLM
description_zh: Onyx 是一个面向企业和团队的开源 AI 平台，作为各类大语言模型的应用层，提供统一的聊天与智能体交互界面，并支持自托管或接入主流闭源/开源模型。它的核心能力包括 Agentic RAG、深度研究、联网搜索、代码执行、文件与图像生成、语音交互，以及通过 50+ 连接器和 MCP 对接外部应用与数据源。典型场景包括企业知识库问答、跨系统信息检索、研究分析报告生成、面向业务流程的 AI 助手构建等。

title: microsoft/agent-framework
description_en: A framework for building, orchestrating and deploying AI agents and multi-agent workflows with support for Python and .NET.
description_zh: Microsoft Agent Framework 是一个面向 AI 应用开发者与企业团队的多语言框架，用于构建、编排和部署 AI Agent 及多智能体工作流，支持 Python 和 .NET。它的核心特点是基于图的工作流编排，可把 Agent 与确定性函数连接起来，并支持流式处理、检查点、人工介入和调试。框架还提供开发调试界面、可观测性集成、中间件机制以及多模型提供方支持，适合用于从简单对话助手到复杂业务自动化流程的开发。

title: sherlock-project/sherlock
description_en: Hunt down social media accounts by username across social networks
description_zh: Sherlock 是一个按用户名在 400 多个社交网络中检索账号的开源工具，用于快速判断某个用户名在哪些平台上存在。它面向安全研究、OSINT 信息收集、调查取证以及品牌/个人账号排查等场景，核心能力是基于多平台规则进行自动化用户名匹配与结果汇总。除了本地运行外，它也支持通过云端 Actor 方式使用，适合需要批量、高效跨平台搜索账号的用户。

title: block/goose
description_en: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM
description_zh: goose 是一个本地运行、开源且可扩展的 AI Agent，面向开发者自动化完成从原型搭建、代码编写到执行测试、排错和工程流程编排等任务，不只提供代码建议，还能自主调用外部 API 和推进完整开发过程。它的关键特点是兼容任意 LLM、支持多模型配置与 MCP 服务集成，并提供桌面端和 CLI 形态，适合需要提升研发效率、处理复杂开发流水线或快速迭代项目的工程团队与个人开发者。
